mapper.select: select id, material_id, change_type, change_num, before_stock, after_stock, use_person, remark, create_time from tb_stock_record where id = #{id}
mapper.insert: insert into tb_stock_record(material_id, change_type, change_num, before_stock, after_stock, use_person, remark, create_time) values (#{materialId}, #{changeType}, #{changeNum}, #{beforeStock}, #{afterStock}, #{usePerson}, #{remark}, #{createTime})

insert into tb_stock_record(material_id, change_type, change_num, before_stock, after_stock, use_person, remark, create_time) values
(#{entity.materialId}, #{entity.changeType}, #{entity.changeNum}, #{entity.beforeStock}, #{entity.afterStock}, #{entity.usePerson}, #{entity.remark}, #{entity.createTime})

insert into tb_stock_record(material_id, change_type, change_num, before_stock, after_stock, use_person, remark, create_time) values
(#{entity.materialId}, #{entity.changeType}, #{entity.changeNum}, #{entity.beforeStock}, #{entity.afterStock}, #{entity.usePerson}, #{entity.remark}, #{entity.createTime})
on duplicate key update material_id = values(material_id), change_type = values(change_type), change_num = values(change_num), before_stock = values(before_stock), after_stock = values(after_stock), use_person = values(use_person), remark = values(remark), create_time = values(create_time)
mapper.update:
update tb_stock_record
material_id = #{materialId},
change_type = #{changeType},
change_num = #{changeNum},
before_stock = #{beforeStock},
after_stock = #{afterStock},
use_person = #{usePerson},
remark = #{remark},
create_time = #{createTime},
where id = #{id}
